title: The Magic Mirror: Your Inner Light

topics.title: Forever You
topics.content: Look into your magic mirror! It shows a tiny light inside you that never goes away. Even when you sleep or grow big, your light is always there.

topics.title: Little Star Inside
topics.content: You have a little star inside your heart. It is a piece of something very special and loving. You are bright and important!
topics.translation: You are a tiny part of something very special.

title: The Happy Mirror: Just Try Your Best

topics.title: Do and Smile
topics.content: When you draw, play, or build, just have fun! Don’t worry about winning. Your mirror smiles when you try your best.
topics.translation: Just do your best and enjoy.

topics.title: My Mind Buddy
topics.content: Your mind is like a little friend. If you talk nicely to it, it helps you feel happy. If you get upset, take a deep breath and help your mind calm down.
topics.translation: Your mind can help you or trouble you.
topics.power: I make my mind my friend.

topics.title: Big Friend Helps Me
topics.content: You don’t have to do everything alone. There is a big loving friend who helps you. You can relax and feel safe.
topics.translation: A big friend is always there for you.

title: The Kind Mirror: Be a Helper

topics.title: I Show the Way
topics.content: When you share toys or help someone, others learn from you. You become a little leader!

topics.title: Always Helped
topics.content: When you feel love and trust, help comes to you in many ways.

topics.title: Tiny Gift, Big Love
topics.content: A smile, a hug, or a flower is a big gift when given with love.
topics.sloka: पत्रं पुष्पं फलं तोयं यो मे भक्त्या प्रयच्छति ।
topics.translation: Small things with love are special.

topics.title: Things Get Better
topics.content: If something feels sad, don’t worry. It will pass, and happy times will come again.
topics.sloka: यदा यदा हि धर्मस्य ग्लानिर्भवति भारत ।

topics.title: Little Moments
topics.content: Big feelings don’t last forever. They come and go like clouds.

title: The Choice Mirror: I Can Choose

topics.title: Let It Go
topics.content: If you feel upset, you can let it go like a balloon flying away.

topics.title: Choose Kindness
topics.content: Every day, you can choose to be kind, brave, and happy.
topics.translation: You can choose what to do.

topics.title: Think and Do
topics.content: When you think good thoughts and do good actions, you shine bright like a star!
topics.sloka: यत्र योगेश्वरः कृष्णो यत्र पार्थो धनुर्धरः ।
topics.translation: Good thinking and action bring success.
